# close()

**Instance Method**

Closes the web view when it’s no longer needed.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor func close()
```

## Discussion

Closes the web view by unloading its webpage and canceling any pending load requests. A closed web view no longer responds to new requests nor sends delegate messages. It is invoked automatically if the receiver’s enclosing window or host window is closed and sending [doc://com.apple.webkit/documentation/WebKit/WebView-swift.class/shouldCloseWithWindow] to the receiver returns [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true]. Use this method to stop the receiver from loading and sending delegate messages.

## Closing the View

- **shouldCloseWithWindow**: A Boolean that indicates whether the web view should close when its window or host window closes.
